fields.name: logoText
fields.label: Logo Text
fields.instruction: This appears on the top left of your site

fields.name: showGithubButton
fields.label: Show GitHub Button
fields.instruction: Turn on to show a GitHub button in the navbar

fields.name: githubButtonText
fields.label: GitHub Button Text
fields.instruction: Text shown on the GitHub button

sections.label: Hero Section
sections.instruction: This is the very first thing visitors see when they open your portfolio — make it count

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Your Full Name
fields.instruction: This will be displayed as the main heading

fields.name: description
fields.label: Short Bio
fields.instruction: Write 2 to 3 sentences about who you are and what you do
fields.placeholder: I am a passionate developer with experience in building web applications for startups and clients...

fields.name: profileImage
fields.label: Your Profile Photo
fields.instruction: This will be shown as a circular image on the right side of the hero section

fields.name: resumeLink
fields.label: Resume Link
fields.instruction: Paste a link to your resume — visitors will click a button to view it

sections.label: Skills
sections.instruction: Group your skills into categories — for example Frontend, Backend, Tools, Design etc.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Category Name
fields.instruction: Give this group of skills a name

fields.name: skills
fields.label: Skills
fields.instruction: Type a skill name and press Enter or click Add to add it

sections.label: Work Experience
sections.instruction: Add your work history here. If you are a student or fresher with no experience, turn off the toggle below

fields.name: showExperience
fields.label: Show Work Experience Section
fields.instruction: Turn off if you have no work experience — the section will be hidden from your portfolio

fields.name: sectionTitle
fields.label: Section Heading
fields.instruction: The title shown at the top of this section

fields.name: sectionDesc
fields.label: Section Description
fields.instruction: A short line describing your experience
fields.placeholder: Here is a summary of my professional journey so far...

fields.name: items
fields.label: Experience Entries
fields.instruction: Add each job or internship as a separate entry

fields.name: role
fields.label: Your Job Title
fields.instruction: The position or role you held

fields.name: companyLink
fields.label: Company Website
fields.instruction: Optional — visitors can click the company name to visit their site

fields.name: date
fields.label: Duration
fields.instruction: When did you work here

fields.name: desc
fields.label: What did you do?
fields.instruction: Describe your responsibilities and achievements
fields.placeholder: Built and maintained web applications, worked with a team of 5 developers...

fields.name: skills
fields.label: Skills Used
fields.instruction: What technologies or tools did you use in this role

fields.name: companyLogo
fields.label: Company Logo
fields.instruction: Upload the company logo — shown as a small image next to the role

fields.name: showDoc
fields.label: Attach Experience Letter or Certificate
fields.instruction: Turn on if you want to show a document like an experience letter or internship certificate

fields.name: doc
fields.label: Document Image
fields.instruction: Upload your experience letter or certificate as an image — only visible if the toggle above is on

sections.label: Projects
sections.instruction: Showcase your best work here. Add at least 1 project, up to 8.

fields.name: description
fields.label: What does this project do?
fields.instruction: Explain what the project does and what problem it solves
fields.placeholder: A full stack e-commerce platform where users can browse, add to cart and checkout products...

fields.name: image
fields.label: Project Thumbnail
fields.instruction: This image is shown on the project card — use a screenshot or banner

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Technologies Used
fields.instruction: Type a technology and press Enter to add it

fields.name: github
fields.label: GitHub Repository Link
fields.instruction: Visitors will see a View Code button linking here

fields.name: webapp
fields.label: Live Demo Link
fields.instruction: Visitors will see a View Live App button linking here

fields.name: showMembers
fields.label: Was this a Team Project?
fields.instruction: Turn on if multiple people worked on this project — you can add their details below

fields.name: member
fields.label: Team Members
fields.instruction: Add each team member — only shown if the toggle above is on

fields.name: img
fields.label: Member Photo
fields.instruction: Small circular avatar shown on the project card

sections.label: Education
sections.instruction: Add your educational background — university, college or any formal degree

fields.name: sectionDesc
fields.label: Section Description
fields.instruction: A short line about your educational background
fields.placeholder: Here is a summary of my educational journey...

fields.name: items
fields.label: Education Entries
fields.instruction: Add each degree or program as a separate entry

fields.name: degree
fields.label: Degree or Program
fields.placeholder: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

fields.name: showGrade
fields.label: Show Grade or GPA
fields.instruction: Turn off if you do not want your grade to be visible

fields.name: grade
fields.label: Grade or GPA
fields.instruction: Only shown if the toggle above is on

fields.name: desc
fields.label: Description
fields.instruction: What did you study or achieve during this program
fields.placeholder: Studied core subjects like data structures, algorithms, databases and software engineering...

fields.name: img
fields.label: Institute Logo
fields.instruction: Upload your university or school logo — shown as a small thumbnail

sections.label: Certifications
sections.instruction: Add any online courses or certifications you have completed. Turn off if you have none.

fields.name: showCertifications
fields.label: Show Certifications Section
fields.instruction: Turn off if you have no certifications — the section will be hidden from your portfolio

fields.name: items
fields.label: Certifications
fields.instruction: Add each certification as a separate entry

fields.name: issuer
fields.label: Issued By
fields.instruction: The platform or organization that gave you this certification

fields.name: credentialLink
fields.label: Verification Link
fields.instruction: Paste a link where visitors can verify your certificate

fields.name: image
fields.label: Certificate Image
fields.instruction: Upload an image of your certificate if you want to display it

sections.label: Contact and Social Links
sections.instruction: Let visitors know how to reach you and find you online

fields.name: email
fields.label: Your Email Address
fields.instruction: Visitors can click a button to email you directly

fields.name: github
fields.label: GitHub Profile Link
fields.instruction: Your public GitHub profile

fields.name: showFacebook
fields.label: Show Facebook Link
fields.instruction: Turn on to display a Facebook icon in the footer

fields.name: facebook
fields.label: Facebook Profile Link
fields.instruction: Only shown if the toggle above is on

fields.name: showTwitter
fields.label: Show Twitter / X Link
fields.instruction: Turn on to display a Twitter icon in the footer

fields.name: twitter
fields.label: Twitter / X Profile Link
fields.instruction: Only shown if the toggle above is on

fields.name: showInstagram
fields.label: Show Instagram Link
fields.instruction: Turn on to display an Instagram icon in the footer

fields.name: instagram
fields.label: Instagram Profile Link
fields.instruction: Only shown if the toggle above is on

sections.label: Footer
sections.instruction: Customize the bottom section of your portfolio

fields.name: footerName
fields.label: Your Name in Footer
fields.instruction: Shown as the footer logo or brand name
